resources.string: Typographer
Sent a message with every formatting style
Combine all styles in one message
💡 Hint: bold, italic, quote, spoiler, link, code, and more in one text
🎊 Every style approved!
Spoiler hunter
Revealed five hidden texts
Reveal five spoiler blocks in chats
💡 Hint: tap yellow hidden blocks in messages
🎊 Five hidden texts revealed!
No markers
Formatted text only via the selection menu
Use the formatting menu when selecting text
💡 Hint: select text → ⋮ → pick a style and send
🎊 Not a single manual marker!
Enter master
Sent ten messages with Enter only
Enable Send with Enter and send 10 messages
💡 Hint: chat settings → send with Enter
🎊 Enter sent ten messages!
Giant & microscope
Sent messages at minimum and maximum font size
Send text at the smallest and largest font size
💡 Hint: settings → chat font size
🎊 From ant to billboard!
Cloud keeper
Saved a backup to Google Drive
Successfully create a Google Drive backup
💡 Hint: settings → backup → Google Drive
🎊 Backup in the cloud!
Drive pilot
Picked a Google account three times for Drive
Switch Google accounts in backup three times
💡 Hint: change Google account in backup settings
🎊 Three accounts — all roads known!
Live wire
Received a message in real time via WebSocket
Stay in an open chat when a new message arrives
💡 Hint: keep the chat open — the message arrives instantly
🎊 WebSocket lightning caught!
From the shadows
Opened a chat from a push notification
Tap a message notification
💡 Hint: get a push and open the chat directly
🎊 From the shadows — into chat!
Watchman
Opened a chat from notification three times with app lock on
With app lock enabled, open chat from push 3 times
💡 Hint: PIN or biometrics + message notification
🎊 Watchman passed guard three times!
Carousel
Watched the home projects carousel for 30 seconds
Don\'t touch the projects carousel for 30 seconds
💡 Hint: Home → projects → just watch
🎊 Carousel watched for 30 seconds!
Format mirror
Sent formatted messages on the site and app the same day
Format a message on the site and in the app the same day
💡 Hint: bold, italic, or another style on both platforms
🎊 Format mirrored on both platforms!
Synchronist
Restored chats from Google Drive
Successfully restore a Google Drive backup
💡 Hint: settings → restore from Google Drive
🎊 Past and present synchronized!
Quote of the day
Sent three messages with blockquote formatting
Send three messages using Quote formatting
💡 Hint: select text → ⋮ → Quote
🎊 Three quotes — mini anthology ready!
Midnight editor
Formatted text right after midnight
Apply formatting between 00:00 and 00:05
💡 Hint: night shift styling in the input field
🎊 Midnight styling shift accepted!
Polyglot friend
Sent messages in Russian, Ukrainian, and English
Switch app language and send a message in ru, uk, and en
💡 Hint: settings → language → message in chat
🎊 Three languages — polyglot friend!
Silence
Sent an emoji-only message with hidden text inside
A message of only emoji and a spoiler inside
💡 Hint: emoji outside, ||secret|| inside
🎊 Silence with a secret inside!
Reaction streak
Ten reactions in a row on incoming messages in one chat
React to 10 incoming messages in a row
💡 Hint: one chat, incoming messages only, no gaps
🎊 Ten reactions in a row — respect!
